text.title: cloud-run-monitoring Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cloud-run-monitoring as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using print() statements or unstructured logger.info("user_id: " + user_id) for application logging.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unstructured logs cannot be filtered by field (e.g., user_id = "u123"), cannot generate log-based metrics, and are 10x slower to search in Cloud Logging. Structured JSON is parsed at ingest with zero extra cost.
